# @platform/platform-logging

Pino-backed structured JSON logger for Node runtime with browser-safe wrapper, redaction config, and request/context logger helpers.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/platform-logging
Version: 0.1.0
Component: platform-logging
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: observability-core
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: experimental
Role: platform
Class: experimental.platform
Catalog lifecycle: experimental
Visibility: internal
Support level: experimental
Review cadence: on-change
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Provide createLogger, createChildLogger, createRequestLogger for Node runtime
- Provide createBrowserLogger as a safe console-based wrapper for browser
- Enforce redaction config for credentials, tokens, cookies, DSNs, connection strings
- Export safeErrorMeta and safeContextMeta serialisation helpers

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not perform tracing — spans are managed by platform-observability
- Does not import adapters or domain packages
- Browser logger does not use Node pino directly

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Import from @platform/platform-logging — public exports only
